description: Establish baseline scope, identify stakeholders, evaluate pain points, and define high-level business goals.
Elicit functional, non-functional, reporting, data, and compliance requirements from business users.
Analyze, groom, model, and prioritize requirements, checking for compliance, gaps, and feasibility.
Design database schemas, logical architectures, REST API contracts, and user screen transition flows.
Audit testing coverage, track UAT progress, verify trace matrix, and run release readiness gates.
Package production deliverables, compile training resources, write release notes, and deploy.
